title: payment — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by PaymentServiceProvider::boot(). All rules are used both by the observer chain (for authoritative refusal on write) AND by FormRequest data classes (for early request-time validation with clear error surfaces).

rules.name: valid_provider
rules.description: Value is one of the 6 supported provider slugs: stripe / paddle / adyen / square / paypal / custom_webhook. Backed by the PaymentProvider enum cast.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: stripe, paddle, adyen, square, paypal, custom_webhook.

rules.name: valid_currency
rules.description: ISO 4217 3-letter uppercase currency code. Must be one of the supported currency codes shipped in data/three-ds-version-catalog.json → supported_currencies (all major currencies).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP, JPY).

rules.name: valid_positive_amount
rules.description: amount_cents is a positive integer. Zero-amount payments are refused (creates a Payment row that fails downstream reconciliation with Invoice.mark_paid).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a positive integer (> 0).

rules.name: valid_capture_method
rules.description: Enum: automatic (default) / manual. manual requires `payment_manual_capture` entitlement (Medium+).

rules.name: valid_confirmation_method
rules.description: Enum: automatic (default; provider auto-confirms) / manual (customer explicitly confirms via SDK, required for 3DS2).

rules.name: valid_next_action_type
rules.description: Enum: redirect_to_url / use_stripe_sdk / three_d_secure_redirect / verify_with_micro_deposits / oxxo_display_details. Only used when status='requires_action'.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a recognized next-action type.

rules.name: valid_dispute_reason
rules.description: Enum: fraudulent / duplicate / product_not_received / product_unacceptable / subscription_canceled / credit_not_processed / general / customer_initiated / unrecognized. Backed by data/dispute-reason-catalog.json (source of truth).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of the 9 supported dispute reasons. See data/dispute-reason-catalog.json.

rules.name: valid_dispute_status
rules.description: Enum: warning_needs_response / warning_under_review / warning_closed / needs_response / under_review / charge_refunded / won / lost. Warning states = provider early-warning; full states = funds provisionally withdrawn.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid dispute status.

rules.name: valid_evidence_shape
rules.description: evidence jsonb matches the shape: { customer_signature?, receipt?, service_documentation?, product_description?, refund_policy?, communication_log?, uncategorized_text? }. At least one field non-null on submit.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must contain at least one evidence field. Valid fields: customer_signature, receipt, service_documentation, product_description, refund_policy, communication_log, uncategorized_text.

rules.name: valid_provider_reference_format
rules.description: provider_reference_id validates against a per-provider format regex: Stripe pm_[A-Za-z0-9]{16,}, Paddle payment_method_id (opaque UUID-ish), Adyen storedPaymentMethodId (alphanumeric), Square CARD_NONCE-*, PayPal payment_method (alphanumeric), custom_webhook (caller-defined, at least 8 characters).
rules.default_message: The :attribute does not match the expected format for the ':provider' provider.

rules.name: valid_last4
rules.description: String of exactly 4 numeric characters. NEVER the full PAN (PCI-DSS Level 1).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be exactly 4 digits (last4 of the card / bank account, never the full number).

rules.name: valid_exp_month_year
rules.description: exp_month IN [1, 12] + exp_year IN [current_year, current_year + 20]. Applied cross-field (validates the pair).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid card expiry (month 1-12, year within 20 years of today).

rules.name: valid_state_transition
rules.description: For PaymentIntent + PaymentDispute state transitions. Enforces one-way state machines (see observers.json for the full transition tables). Any invalid transition returns validation error with the allowed target states.
rules.default_message: The transition from ':from' to ':to' is not allowed. Allowed targets: :allowed.

rules.name: valid_provider_webhook_signature
rules.description: Called by the payment.webhook_verify middleware. Verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature per provider signing scheme: Stripe (t=timestamp,v1=signature), Paddle (Paddle-Signature), Adyen (HmacSignature over notification payload), Square (Square-Signature), PayPal (Paypal-Transmission-Sig with certificate verification), custom_webhook (X-Payment-Signature = hex(HMAC-SHA256(secret, timestamp+body))).
rules.default_message: The webhook signature is invalid for the ':provider' provider.
